title: The Quiet Ones
overview: When Charlotte’s father dies, she inherits his huge debts. With only a brief period of respite, she turns to her newfound Friend Danni to make money from their social media exploits to solve her money woes. Danni enlists the help of three of the sexiest stars on social media that she can find. One complete narcissist, one misanthrope, and one absolute lunatic. Together they create wild and edgy content to post behind a paywall – but it’s not long before each personality begins to grate on the other and Charlotte is caught up in a deadly war of escalating egotism and dangerously self-destructive personalities.
